note: Registry datasets that are enabled but cannot be analyzed. Each entry records the live HTTP evidence re-verified during the last download.

datasets.evidence: Repository metadata reports gated="manual". Anonymous: GET https://datasets-server.huggingface.co/splits?dataset=menesnas/Pharmacy_Identity_Synthetic_QA -> HTTP 401. Authenticated as Hugging Face user "bilalabic": the same endpoint returns HTTP 404 "not accessible with the current credentials", and GET https://huggingface.co/datasets/menesnas/Pharmacy_Identity_Synthetic_QA/resolve/main/Pharmacy_Identity_Synthetic_QA.json returns HTTP 403 "Access to dataset menesnas/Pharmacy_Identity_Synthetic_QA is restricted and you are not in the authorized list". The repository exists and its data card is readable; only the data files are withheld.

reverified_checks.detail: {"error":"The dataset does not exist, or is not accessible with the current credentials (private or gated). Please check the spelling of the dataset name or retry with other authentication credentials."}

datasets.unblock: The dataset owner must approve an access request for the auditing account at https://huggingface.co/datasets/menesnas/Pharmacy_Identity_Synthetic_QA, after which the audit can re-run with HF_TOKEN set.

datasets.evidence: Anonymous: GET https://huggingface.co/api/datasets/uzcaliskan/magibu_dataset_drilling -> HTTP 401 {"error":"Invalid username or password."}. Authenticated as Hugging Face user "bilalabic": the same endpoint returns HTTP 404 {"error":"Repository not found"}. A valid credential turning 401 into 404 means the repository is not visible to this account at all, so it is deleted, renamed, or private to a different owner. Its existence, visibility, and row count cannot be confirmed.
